item.description:
Hi there

Hi, I’m Jan Steffen, an IT professional based in Oberems, Hessen, Germany. With a passion for cloud technologies and software engineering, I’ve built my career around designing and implementing robust, scalable systems.

Talks

  • WeAreDevelopers DevOps Day 2021/11 - Monoskope: Developer Self-Service Across Clusters (Recording)

Professional experience

Schwarz Digits 🌐

  • since 03/2026

BWI GmbH 🌐

  • 04/2023 - 02/2026 | Lead IT Architect

finleap connect GmbH 🌐

  • 09/2021 - 04/2023 | Cloud Tech Lead
  • 08/2020 - 09/2021 | Senior Cloud Engineer
  • 06/2019 - 08/2020 | Platform Engineer

AdVision digital GmbH 🌐

  • 01/2017 - 06/2019 | Senior Software Engineer

neveling.net GmbH 🌐

  • 09/2015 - 01/2017 | Software Engineer

Freelancer

  • 10/2010 - 09/2015 | Software Engineer

Education

  • 2010 - 2015 | Hamburg University of Applied Sciences - Master of Science - Computer Science
  • 2007 - 2010 | Technische Hochschule Mittelhessen - Bachelor of Science - Computer Science

Certifications

  • CKA: Certified Kubernetes Administrator, The Linux Foundation - August 2020 - valid until August 2023

Technologies / Tools / Worked with

  • Kubernetes
  • Docker
  • Helm
  • Gitlab CI/CD
  • gRPC
  • Git

Paradigms / Architectural Patterns

  • Object-oriented programming
  • Event Sourcing
  • Microservices
  • GitOps

Programming Languages

  • Go - 7 years of working experience
  • C# - 9 years of working experience

Other Profiles

  • The Linux Foundation
  • Sessionize
  • GitHub
  • Flickr
  • LinkedIn
